name: atomic-accidents-a-history-of-nuclear-meltdowns-and-disasters
description: James Mahaffey's history of nuclear disasters — from early radiation experiments through Chernobyl and Fukushima — exploring the science, human error, and engineering failures behind each accident.
useCase: Understand the causes and consequences of major nuclear accidents and the lessons learned for safety and risk management.
knownRisks: Technical content may require basic science literacy
Author has clear views on nuclear energy that not everyone shares
